headline: Trump 🍊👑 CRUSHES Massie 💥 & PUNTS Rebels to the CURB 🗑️
text: Trump 🍊👑 EXERTS IRON GRIP 🪓 on GOP 🐘, sending Kentucky REBEL Massie 🦖 to the DUSTBIN 💨 with Ed Gallrein 🐴 cruising to 55% 🍰 VICTORY! Another one BITES the DUST 🎸💥 as the retribution TOUR 🚌🔥 keeps ROLLING over critics like a MAGA steamroller 🚜! Massie the THORN 🌵 opposed Trump's TAX SPEND 💸📉 budget cuz it blew the DEFICIT 💣 sky high, voted to CURTAIL 🛑 military ops in Venezuela & Iran 🇮🇷, and drove the EPSTEIN FILES 📜💦 release like a justice AVENGER 🦸‍♂️ – all landing him on Trump's ENEMIES LIST 📋😈 with a $20M 💰💸 ouster CAMPAIGN! Trey Grayson 🗳️ says it's pure Trump POWER 💪, with Massie making FRENEMIES 🤡 in local biz & skipping the GRIND 🛠️ for EPSTEIN SPOTLIGHT 🔦🍆! Gallrein barely CAMPAIGNED 🗣️🚫, just leaned on Trump's ENDORSEMENT 👑 & millions in CASH RAIN 🌧️💵 to coast DOUBLE-DIGIT 🍔🏆! Now Massie joins Bill Cassidy 🦆 & Indiana LEGGOS 🏛️ in the UNEMPLOYED CLUB 😭🪦, while John Cornyn 🌽 in Texas gets PAID with Ken Paxton ⚔️ as 'true MAGA WARRIOR' 🛡️ over a 'good man' 🤷 who wasn't TOUGH ENOUGH 💪 when TIMES WERE TOUGH 😩! Cornyn tried naming a HIGHWAY 🛣️ after Trump but got SNUBBED 👋, sparking SENATE ANGER 🔥 from Susan Collins 🧓 'I don't UNDERSTAND' 🤯! Trump's PURGE 🧹 may COST 💸 at MIDTERMS 📅 as loyal MAGA picks struggle to WIN OVER INDEPENDENTS 🕊️ while ECONOMY 😣 polls SINK! Defeated REPS like Cassidy now VOTING to LIMIT 🚫 Iran WAR & BOUNCING the $1B BALLROOM 💃💰 funding – parting GIFTS 🎁😈 that could DERAIL SPENDING PACKAGES 📦 & NOMINEES 🧑‍⚖️, handing DEMS 🫏 campaign AMMO 🔫 to TIE opponents to UNPOPULAR 🍊! Trump STEADILY removing CRITICS 🗣️ but they may SHANK him with LAST LAUGHS 😂 on the way OUT 🚪!
